item.title: Get ahead and level up with the Digital Skills Hub
item.description: Want to feel more confident and get ahead for the new academic year with the tech you use every day?

item.title: Celebrate the National Year of Reading with Analogue Afternoons
item.description: Looking for ways to disconnect from the digital world and reconnect with your creativity?

item.title: Improving our data security: Updates to public site settings
item.description: We've made some important updates to how Microsoft Teams sites work at NTU, to help keep our information safe and properly managed.

item.title: Make a difference on campus — become a HealthyNTU Champion
item.description: If you’re passionate about wellbeing and love getting involved, come join us!

item.title: Catching up with the VC
item.description: NTU's Vice-Chancellor, Professor Dave Petley, sits down with 2025/26 NTSU President, Libby Sinclair, to catch up on highlights from the year and NTU’s future plans.

item.title: Postgraduate taught students: don't miss your chance to tell us what you think
item.description: The Postgraduate Taught Experience Survey (PTES) ends soon - complete it now and you could win one of five £100 Amazon vouchers*

item.title: Some of our online services unavailable on Tuesday 2 June
item.description: Due to essential maintenance, there will be a scheduled break in some of our online services from 5pm until 9pm on Tuesday 2 June.

item.title: Good news from the Newton nest – Archie and P9’s 2026 chick is thriving!
item.description: The first (and only) chick of the season was spotted early on the morning of Tuesday 29 April. Follow his progress via the nest camera.

item.title: Managing NTU’s digital storage limits: File clean-up update
item.description: From Monday 1 June, a clean-up rule will be applied to all student OneDrive accounts, as well as Teams and SharePoint sites.

item.title: Find out about postgraduate study at our open event
item.description: Thinking about what’s next after you graduate? A postgraduate degree could help you progress in your career, earn a higher salary, or give you the tools to change your professional direction.
